title: S.T.A.R.T. Triage (Mass Casualty)
symptoms: Need to sort who gets treated first
immediate_steps: Assess Respiration: If not breathing, open airway. If still not breathing -> DECEASED (Black). If breathing >30/min -> IMMEDIATE (Red).
Assess Perfusion: If capillary refill >2 seconds or no radial pulse -> IMMEDIATE (Red). Control major bleeding.
Assess Mental Status: If unable to follow simple commands -> IMMEDIATE (Red).
If they pass all three (breathing <30, good pulse, follows commands) -> DELAYED (Yellow).
Anyone who can walk away when told -> MINOR (Green).
avoid: Do not spend too much time on one victim (triage should take <30 seconds per person)
Do not perform CPR during mass triage if resources are overwhelmed
